name: Implement Pre-signed URL API for File Uploads
description: Develop POST /groups/generate-presigned-urls to enable secure document uploads (DOCX, Excel) for AI analysis.

name: Implement AI Sprint Generation API
description: Develop POST /groups/{group_id}/sprints/generation including RBAC validation for Owner/Manager roles and event-driven request handling.

name: Develop AI Document Parsing Logic
description: Implement the backend service logic to parse uploaded DOCX and Excel files and transform content into structured sprint tasks using LLM.

name: Build AI Generation and Context Input UI
description: Create the frontend interface for document uploads and a text area for users to provide additional instructions/context for the AI.

name: Develop Task Preview and Edit Interface
description: Implement a UI component to display AI-generated tasks in a preview state, allowing users to modify or delete items before final persistence.

name: Implement Sprint Export to Excel API
description: Develop GET /groups/{group_id}/sprints/{sprint_id}/export to generate and download an Excel file containing the work list and sprint details.

name: Implement Task Status Classification Logic
description: Develop the business logic to categorize tasks into DONE, LATE, EARLY, or SPILLOVER based on completion dates and due dates.

name: Develop Sprint Metrics Aggregation Engine
description: Implement automated calculations for total estimated points, completion rates, and spillover counts for sprint reporting.

name: Develop Burndown Chart Calculation Logic
description: Create the backend engine to calculate daily expected vs. actual burndown values based on completed story points.

name: Build Sprint Progress and Burndown UI
description: Implement the frontend dashboard to visualize sprint metrics and the burndown chart for real-time progress tracking.
